particulars.description: Freehold property - land lying to the north of cherry lane, rode heath, stoke-on-trent - title no: CH300480; and. Part of the freehold property - land on the north side of cherry lane, rode heath, stoke-on-trent, ST7 3QX - title no: CH581497 (edged red on the plan contained in the legal charge).

Freehold property known as lawson mere nurseries cherry lane rode heath stoke on trent with the benefit of all rights, licences, guarantees, rent deposits, contracts, deeds undertakings & warranties relating to the property. Any shares or membership rights in any management company for the property. Any goodwill of any business from time to time carried on at the property. Any rental & other money payable and any lease licence or other interest created in respect of the property & all other payments whatever in respect of the property.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
